query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (present climate) from stormflo200ar_klimaarna

3.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand extent (intersects municipality)

4.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (by kommunenummer)

5.description: find buildings within 50 m of reduced storm polygons (dwithin)

6.description: compute distances per building to storm polygons, aggregate MIN(distance) and return 10 nearest buildings with municipality and county

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, lokalid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT b.bygningsnummer, b.bygningsstatus, b.kommunenummer, b.kommunenavn, b.bygningid, b.representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning b WHERE b.kommunenummer = '4204';
